blocks.content: For the first hour it was just a dance. Fast songs, the group moving together, Eli orbiting in and out. Kit danced the way he always danced — badly, without embarrassment — and Daisy made fun of him for it.
Eli appeared from the crowd, cup of punch in each hand, distributing them like a mayor.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: The DJ just redeemed himself. I'll allow it.
Then Kit saw them. Brooke and Ryan, across the gym. Her hand in his, easy and natural.
He looked at Daisy. She'd already seen them.
She nodded once. Looked back at the dance floor. So did he.
